action.reasoning: Observation: Val AP=0.1996 after 30 epochs, still improving steadily. Loss still declining. Model is undertrained and could benefit from larger capacity. Analysis: (1) hidden_dim=300 is small, increase to 512. (2) 30 epochs not enough, need 60+. (3) Cosine decay too aggressive, need warmup. (4) Add JumpingKnowledge for better multi-layer feature use. (5) Lower pos_weight cap (50 vs 100) for stability. Decision: Train larger model with better hyperparameters, submit eval for current best to get test baseline.
